mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ${tableName} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT a.attname as column_name, pg_catalog.format_type(a.atttypid, a.atttypmod) as data_type FROM pg_index i JOIN pg_attribute a ON a.attrelid = i.indrelid AND a.attnum = ANY(i.indkey) WHERE i.indrelid = #{tableName}::regclass AND i.indisprimary LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO export_task (table_name, total_rows, processed_rows, status, created_at) VALUES (#{tableName}, #{totalRows}, 0, 'PENDING', now())
mapper.update: UPDATE export_task SET processed_rows = #{processedRows}, status = 'RUNNING' WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE export_task SET status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
